programme.title: One Day: Justice Delivered
programme.desc: A judge bound by law has to pass unfair judgments on some criminal cases due to lack of evidence. After retirement, he becomes a vigilante and decides to punish the crooks who walk free.

programme.title: Luck
programme.desc: Musa, an underworld kingpin and a firm believer in luck, designs a series of life threatening adventure sports with hefty prize money for people around the world. However, the participants can only survive and win if they are exceptionally lucky.

programme.title: Aarakshan
programme.desc: The controversial policy of caste-based reservations in government jobs and educational institutions in India leads to a conflict between a teacher hailing from a lower class, his good friend belonging to the upper caste, and his mentor.

programme.title: Khubsoorat
programme.desc: The lady of a household runs the place with utmost strictness but hilarity and chaos ensues when her daughter-in-law's younger sister pays a visit and tries to change the rules in the house.

programme.title: Guddi
programme.desc: Kusum is obsessed with Bollywood movies and is unable to distinguish between the real world and the movie world, to the extent that she refuses to marry anyone besides her idol, Dharmendra.

programme.title: Golmaal
programme.desc: Ramprasad works for Bhavani, who discourages his employees from pursuing any hobbies. Things take a hilarious turn when Bhavani catches Ramprasad at a hockey match and he lies about having a twin.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: When a girl becomes a victim of acid attack, her mild-mannered brother Dev is enraged. He takes the law in his own hands to teach a lesson not only to her attacker but also to those who victimised other girls in the past in a similar manner.

programme.title: Aankhen
programme.desc: When Vijay Singh Rajput is unceremoniously stripped of his duties as a bank manager, he decides to seek revenge by robbing the bank. To make the robbery untraceable, he trains three blind men to do the job for him.

programme.title: Wedding Anniversary
programme.desc: Kahani plans a getaway in Goa to celebrate her marriage anniversary with her husband. But he gets caught up in work and she is left alone on the special day. Her night, however, takes a drastic turn when a mysterious guest arrives to accompany her.

programme.title: ORU KUPRASIDHA PAYYAN
programme.desc: Ajayan, an introverted young man, feels helpless when he is accused of murdering an old woman until Hannah, a novice yet astute lawyer, comes to his rescue.

programme.title: Ricky Bhai Yash
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Krishna Ki Love Story
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Jaal Ek Tantra
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: EMI Liya Hai To Chukana Padega
programme.desc: A film that tells the story of a group of people who fall prey to credit card debt and are struggling to repay their loans. They come together to form a support group and devise a plan to fight against the corrupt practices of the credit card companies. The movie highlights the consequences of reckless spending and the importance of financial literacy in an engaging and thought-provoking plot.

programme.title: Dost
programme.desc: Two brothers reunite in order to fulfil the wish of their dying father whom Thakur bitterly humiliates and murders. They intend to marry Thakur's two daughters to seek revenge.

programme.title: Partner
programme.desc: In the romantic comedy film "Partner", we meet Prem, a self-proclaimed love guru who assists people in finding their soulmates. Despite his expertise, Prem's own love life is in disarray until he befriends Bhaskar, a carefree and fun-loving man. The two become business partners and friends, and Prem coaches Bhaskar on the intricacies of romance to help him win over Naina. However, their journey is filled with hilarious hurdles and misunderstandings that test their friendship and love lives.

programme.title: Mard
programme.desc: Vijay grows up to avenge his father, battling brutal oppressors and rising against injustice.

programme.title: Naseeb
programme.desc: Johnny, a struggling waiter guided by fate, rises from obscurity as luck tests his dreams and love.

programme.title: Shakti
programme.desc: Shakti (1982) Hindi crime drama: Honest cop Ashwini faces his son's resentment as he joins the mafia.

programme.title: Naach Lucky Naach
programme.desc: Naach Lucky Naach, a Hindi dubbed musical, follows Lakshmi, whose passion for dance transforms her life after meeting Krishna.

programme.title: Patel S. I. R.
programme.desc: A retired army officer battles drug traffickers in the city. A corrupt cop, ACP Catherine, vows to find him.

programme.title: Power Game
programme.desc: Jiang Chengyi, Xue Fuling and the seven heroes returned to the inn to hold a funeral for the sacrificed Lin Xing. Everyone was immersed in grief. At this time, Zhuang Yuchen visited and brought new official bank information.

programme.title: Blade of Storm
programme.desc: Five years ago, the town's demon gang, the largest gang in the rivers and lakes, made the court jealous because of their power. The leader, Long Xiaotian, in order to keep the rivers and lakes stable and the world was peaceful, announced the dissolution of the town's demon gang. It disappeared in the arena. Five years later, Long Xiaotian, who had already lived in seclusion, was arrested by his wife and was forced to leave the mountain to assassinate Li Shimin. And the misleading deputy gang Cao Rui attacked Long Xiaotian and seized the Demon Sword. Fortunately, Long Xiaotian was rescued by Li Yufeng and Chi Luojin.

programme.title: Till Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Michael and Madison Roland had planned to spend the rest of their lives together, until one day Michael's controlling ways turned their perfect marriage. With the help of her best friend, Madison decides to get away. After adopting a new identity, she meets Alex Stone and learns to love again. All is well, until Michael discovers Madison's whereabouts, and recreates the nightmare she once lived all over again.

programme.title: Curse Of The Nun
programme.desc: A damaged young woman is looking forward to moving to a beautiful new home, but the spirit of a deranged nun wants her to stay right where she is

programme.title: FALLEN STARLET
programme.desc: Rebecca, a rising actress, is shot on her LA doorstep before her 'Godfather III' audition. Investigators face a puzzling crime scene to find her killer.

programme.title: ICE BREAKER
programme.desc: Thirty-year-old Kira Steger vanishes during a frigid Minnesota winter. Friends and family hope she's safe, but the investigation stretches for months before ending in heartbreak, revealing the cruel fate she suffered.

programme.title: TICKET TO RIDE
programme.desc: Bob spent years working on his beloved 1969 K20 Truck, but he needs FantomWorks to solve the mysteries within. Dan's brother-in-law John shows up with a 1962 Ferrari kit car that looks hot, but the wiring could burn it to the ground.

programme.title: NASHVILLE NIGHTMARE
programme.desc: Aspiring country singer Melissa goes missing in Nashville. Found strangled with her rodeo belt, clues lead to a man who killed her to boost his twisted fame.

programme.title: OPEN SEASON
programme.desc: On a frigid fall evening, a hunter in Missouri is found shot to death. Freak hunting accident or cold and calculating homicide? As the mysterious case unfolds, police uncover a web of infidelity and lies, leading to the least likely of suspects.

programme.title: TICKET TO RIDE
programme.desc: Bob spent years working on his beloved 1969 K20 Truck, but he needs FantomWorks to solve the mysteries within. Dan's brother-in-law John shows up with a 1962 Ferrari kit car that looks hot, but the wiring could burn it to the ground.

programme.title: NASHVILLE NIGHTMARE
programme.desc: Aspiring country singer Melissa goes missing in Nashville. Found strangled with her rodeo belt, clues lead to a man who killed her to boost his twisted fame.

programme.title: Love on the Reef
programme.desc: A smart and serious marine biologist and a fun-loving and laissez-faire dive instructor must team up to save their beloved reef from being destroyed before it's too late.

programme.title: The Wedding in the Hamptons
programme.desc: Jenna is a fashion designer who works for her friend's boutique. Their failing business was saved by a famous influencer. When Jenna comes to a lavish Hamptons wedding, she was mistaken for her, but she decides to go along to save business

programme.title: Sparks Over Brooklyn
programme.desc: Single mom and chef Lidia sees her dreams for the future falling apart when arrogant tech innovator Danny buys her beloved family restaurant with plans to turn it into a busy dining experience.

programme.title: Danger on Party Island
programme.desc: Peguam pemalu Mel Dale patah hati apabila dia mendapati adik perempuannya yang berani telah meninggal secara tiba-tiba. Tetapi setelah dia pergi untuk membawa pulang mayat adiknya, dia mula merasakan bahawa ada sesuatu yang mencurigakan. Dan dia mungkin menjadi sasaran seterusnya.

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: Two brothers runs the neighborhood gang, tries to hide their true identities from their mom by pretending to have a day job, but faces a deeper problems when the ruthless mafia boss asks them to do a job for them. The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: Meet
programme.desc: Meet's daughter Sumeet's life changes when Raunak proposes to her. Will she ever know of his link to Shagun?

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. This becomes a battle with traders creating hurdles in her life but she is unstoppable.

programme.title: Agni Vayu
programme.desc: Agni Vayu Is A Romantic Thriller That Tells The Story Of A Young, Vibrant Dr. Agni And An Ambitious Investment Banker Vayu. As Their Love Blossoms, An Unfortunate Turn Of Events Happens That Throws Them Amid Conspiracy, Misunderstanding, Swindling, And All Sorts Of Paradoxes At Every Turn. They Set Out On A Journey To Unravel The Mystery Surrounding These Events. Can They Both Solve It Together And Will They Disclose Their Feelings To Each Other During The Journey.

programme.title: Dharmakshetra
programme.desc: As The Great War Of Mahabharata Is Over, Kurukshetra Lies Barren In Its Great Warriors And King. The Thin Line Between Fair And Unfair, Deceit And Loyalty, Betrayal And Duty, Has Never Been Questioned. Dharmakshetra Resurfaces These Buried Questions And Allows The Legendary Characters Of This Tale An Opportunity To Tell Their Side Of The Story For The Very First Time. In A Post-Apocalyptic Trial, Held In Maharaj Chitragupta'S Court, The Seeming Villains ‘Kauravas' Are Allowed To Accuse The So Called Heroes ‘Pandavas' And Vice Versa, In An Attempt To Justify Their Actions. On A Primary Level, Dharamkshetra Attempts To Ask Some Key Questions About The Nature Of Humanity, While At The Same Time, It Puts Together The Forgotten Pieces Of The Story We Thought We Knew.

programme.title: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Hamare
programme.desc: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Humaare Is A Light-Hearted Celebrity Chat Show Hosted By One Of India'S Most Famous Rj– Pritam Singh. In Each Episode, He Will Welcome Top Female Celebrities From The Entertainment Industry Who Have Played The Roles Of Bhabhi'S & Bahu'S On-Screen, Adding A Pinch Of Glamour To The Show. These Female Celebrities Will Talk About Their Real-World, Tell Their Untold Stories And Reveal How They Live Off-Camera. What'S More? The Episodes Of This Chat Show Will Have An Enthralling Line-Up Of Gag Artists, Activities/Games & Comedy Segments, Along With The Barrel Of Laughs – Pritam.

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This story is about a 19yr old girl named Chunari, who dreams of marriage and a happy family. However, she becomes entangled in the chains of deceit, finding herself on the path to becoming a Dahej Dasi, which is a tradition still prevalent in the backward regions of Rajasthan. The show unfolds into a compelling drama of tradition versus rebellion, love versus oppression.

programme.title: Maata Ki Mahima
programme.desc: In the divine saga inspired by Bhakt Prahlad, witness the journey of Mahima, a devout disciple of Maata, as she challenges the tyranny of Indrayani, whose sins overflow in a reign of oppression. Sent into the heart of Indrayani's lineage, Mahima embodies the triumph of faith over darkness, destined to end the era of tyranny and usher in an era of righteousness.

programme.title: Yam Kisi Se Kam Nahin
programme.desc: A misfit, a God, a husband, and a breadwinner, Yamraj is a common man with a fancy job title. He tries his best to give his family what they need and manages to make a mess of everything in the bargain. Lovable and goofy, this God of Death is anything but grim. Join our hardworking but hen-pecked Yamraj, his beloved buffalo and his motely family and friends in a slice-of-life sitcom to find out how the cookie really crumbles!

programme.title: Beti Hamari Anmol
programme.desc: In this hugely inspirational success story, Anmol, a small town girl, not only fights the societal obstacles faced by any small town girl in our country but also takes on the social stigma she has had to face for being so short heighted that she has been termed as a “dwarf”. Anmol, with her strong will power and belief in herself, fights the hate she has had to receive from her in-law's. Anmol becomes a doctor with the support of her husband, in the same hospital where her father works as a peon, to win back her dignity as well as bring a lot of pride to her and her in law's family.

programme.title: Dharmakshetra
programme.desc: As The Great War Of Mahabharata Is Over, Kurukshetra Lies Barren In Its Great Warriors And King. The Thin Line Between Fair And Unfair, Deceit And Loyalty, Betrayal And Duty, Has Never Been Questioned. programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. This becomes a battle with traders creating hurdles in her life but she is unstoppable.

programme.title: Agni Vayu
programme.desc: Agni Vayu Is A Romantic Thriller That Tells The Story Of A Young, Vibrant Dr. Agni And An Ambitious Investment Banker Vayu. As Their Love Blossoms, An Unfortunate Turn Of Events Happens That Throws Them Amid Conspiracy, Misunderstanding, Swindling, And All Sorts Of Paradoxes At Every Turn. They Set Out On A Journey To Unravel The Mystery Surrounding These Events. Can They Both Solve It Together And Will They Disclose Their Feelings To Each Other During The Journey.

programme.title: Sweety Beauty Parlour
programme.desc: SWEETY BEAUTY PARLOUR" " is a youthful, humorous and satirical exploration of small-town relationships, aspirations, and societal contradictions. This slice of life narrative set against the vivid backdrop of a Punjabi town blends comedy, romance, and social critique to depict the journey of a spirited young woman - Sweety, as she chases her dreams amid traditional expectations and modern ambitions.

programme.title: Crime World
programme.desc: This crime thriller anthology series, hosted by Ronit Roy, explores the dark side of human nature—where extreme emotions such as greed, jealousy, lust, and obsession spiral into shocking crimes. Each episode presents a standalone, fast-paced narrative inspired by passion-driven murders and intense criminal mysteries. Through gripping dramatization and Ronit Roy's commanding narration, the series dissects the emotional triggers that push ordinary individuals toward extraordinary acts of violence. The focus goes beyond the crime itself, uncovering the psychological conflicts and fatal decisions that lead to irreversible consequences.

programme.title: Desi Beatz
programme.desc: From foot-tapping beats to soulful melodies, Desi Beatz showcases a dynamic mix of popular artists, fresh releases, and trending music videos that reflect the pulse of today's Punjabi youth. The show captures the essence of modern Punjab—where tradition meets contemporary sound—making it a perfect blend of rhythm, style, and desi swag. Designed for music lovers of all ages, Desi Beatz turns every moment into a celebration, whether it's party anthems, romantic hits, or viral sensations. Tune in to GTC Punjabi Television and stay connected with what's trending in Punjabi music—loud, lively, and full of desi energy.

programme.title: Surtaaj of Punjab
programme.desc: “Surtaaj of Punjab” is a vibrant Punjabi musical reality show on GTC Punjabi, celebrating the rich cultural heritage of Punjab through its aspiring singers. Hosted by Saira, Anmol Aulakh and Gurjeet Singh, the show features a diverse range of talent competing for the coveted title. Renowned music directors Gurmeet Singh and Jaidev Kumar (Music Director) along with celebrated singer Jyotika Tangri, serve as the esteemed judges, guiding contestants on a musical journey. Each episode is a celebration of talent, emotion, and the magic of Punjabi music.

programme.title: Superhit Cinema- PFF-Bapu Ni Manda Mera
programme.desc: Sukhdev Singh is a superstitious Punjabi farmer who firmly believes his family is cursed to lose newborns. When his son marries a woman named Raunak, they all hold onto hope that things will get better and the family curse can be broken. But as time passes, the fear of the curse grows. The movie explores whether the impending arrival of a new baby will bring joy or more pain to the family. [1, 2, 3]

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.8
programme.desc: Mistaking it for Gwanghae's test, Jeongi sneaks into the Bunwon storeroom to choose pottery, only to be caught red-handed by Gangcheon. While confined, she finally realizes that the man she believed to be Gwanghae was actually someone else. As Jeongi tearfully confesses all the wrongs she has committed against him, Gwanghae listens with a quiet smile.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.9
programme.desc: When Jeongi vows to step forward to clear Gwanghae's name, Taedo grows increasingly frustrated. Fearing that his own fate may once again bring injustice upon innocent people, Gwanghae sends Jeongi away. Meanwhile, Hwa-ryeong urges Jeongi to finally let go of Taedo.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.10
programme.desc: After discovering that Jeongi is a woman, Gwanghae urges her to flee at once. Instead, Jeongi asks for just ten days—enough time to complete the celadon teacups for Yukdo. Hearing rumors that Jeongi and Gwanghae share more than a simple connection, Imhae devises a scheme and locks the two of them together in a single room.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.11
programme.desc: Gwanghae orders Gangcheon to acknowledge Jeongi's achievements and reinstate her at the Bunwon workshop. Soon after, he learns from Hwa-ryeong that Jeongi has already left with Taedo—and discovers the shocking truth that the two are not actually biological siblings. When Yukdo's life is placed in danger, Gangcheon reveals to King Seonjo and the visiting envoy that it was Jeongi who crafted the teacups. As Taedo prepares to confess his feelings to Jeongi, Gwanghae suddenly appears…

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.12
programme.desc: While Gwanghae meets with the envoy, Taedo rescues Jeongi from the warehouse where she has been locked away. Watching Jeongi and Taedo walk off together, Gwanghae is flooded with memories from his past. Taedo warns Jeongi that if she chooses not to be entangled with Gwanghae any longer, she must never allow her true identity as “Jeongi” to be revealed. Back at the Bunwon, Jeongi begins learning the potter's wheel under Yukdo's guidance…

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.13
programme.desc: Consumed by anger, Gwanghae coldly tells Jeongi that she is no longer the person he once knew—and that she has nothing to do with him anymore. Left in tears as she gazes at the pottery she has made, Jeongi vows to earn Gwanghae's forgiveness. Meanwhile, in front of everyone at the Bunwon, Gangcheon orders that Euldam's vessels be destroyed…

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE are four guys performing under the slogan of “chaotic world warm music” - it's Nerd Connection! This band is composed of four graduates of Yonsei University one of the most prestigious universities in Korea. The beginning was almost accidental - Vocalist Seo Yeong-ju and guitarist Choi Seung-won began performing together in 2012 as part of the university's rock band club Medusa. Then bassist Park Jae-hyun and drummer Shin Yeon-tae joined the band and they made their step into the professional music scene with their first single Hymn of the Birds in 2018. The same year they took part in the Emergenza Festival the world's largest festival for unsigned bands. After several regional qualifiers in Korea they passed the Korean qualification which led to the finals at a festival in Germany. With that unbelievable milestone at the very beginning stages of their career the four have pleasantly surprised listeners both at home and abroad until now. In October this year Nerd Connection released their first full-length album. All 12 songs in the album are tied under the concept of nostalgia for things gone by touching listeners in their unique way. In this episode the quartet performs 21st Century Kingdom Hollywood Movie Star Waterfall Bamboo Forest and Good Night Good Dream. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet the four highly talented musicians!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is a band hoping to touch your heart - Touched! Touched is a quintet composed of guitarist D.on drummer Seung bin Kim vocalist and guitarist YunMin bassist John B.Kim and keyboardist Chae Dohyeon who are all graduates of Seoul Institute of the Arts. They are young as a band but they already have an impressive award-winning career. They won the Grand Prize at the 31st Yoo Jae Ha Music Contest in 2020 as the first band in the contest's history the Grand Prize at the 2021 Pyeongtaek National Band Comepetition the Grand Prize at the Hwaseong City Culture Foundation - RISING STAR 4U and another Grand Prize at the Gyeonggi Content Agency Indiestance. Having won three grand prizes in 2021 alone Touched is considered one of the hottest rookie bands in the Korean music scene. Also combining their intense rock energy with sensitive emotional modern rock the quintet is actively pushing their boundaries creating their own genre. In this episode Touched performs The Dawn Star Hi Bully Call Me Love is Dangerous and their cover of Blue which led them to win the Grand Prize at the Yoo Jae Ha Music Contest. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet these five talented artists!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is one of Korea's top bands MONNI! Composed of vocalist Kim Shin-eui bassist Lee In-kyoung guitarist Kong Tae-woo and drummer Jung Hun-tae the quartet made their debut in 2005 with the album One Day Light. Thanks to their outstanding musicality they quickly became known in the underground scene and soon impressed the general public through the music shows I'm A Singer Season 3 Immortal Songs: Singing the Legend King of Mask Singer and more. After a break of 7 years they released their fifth full-length album firmament in November this year. Capturing everything up in the sky from the sun to the moon to stars and light it offers a beautiful depiction of the band's identity that they have built for 17 years. In this episode MONNI performs Romantic Breeze Just so-so Tonight LOVESound as well as their new songs You were my star and Again. Tune in to I'm LIVE and check out their new releases!

But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With its Macan Turbo, Porsche sets the benchmark in the SUV segment. The optional performance package increases the output from 400 to 440 HP. programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Porsche GT3 RS bears a very special wing on its back. Also: the Mercedes-AMG GT S provides understatement and power at the same time. And: the even more uncompromising Radical RX C Turbo.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Mercedes‘ S-Class Coupe is a real masterpiece. We explored what the S 63 AMG Coupe has to offer in comparison to the Bentley Continental and the Rolls Royce Wraith.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Volvo S90 offers Scandinavian elegance and a high level of security features. Jaguar entered the race with its performance sedan XF-S and Cadillac ramped up their luxury level with the CT6.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03:E187 - Lexus RC-F The Attacker from Japan
programme.desc: The BMW M3 and the Mercedes-AMG C63, the top models of the two iconic manufacturers, are in eternal competition. With the Lexus RC F, a competitor from Japan is lurking. Is the Japanese exotic a threat to the German competition?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Swiss tuning company O.CT turned the Lamborghini Huracan into an even more furious beast. Also: the Cadillac CTS-V looks like a regular limousine, but at a second glance it reveals its monstrous power.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Mercedes-AMG C43 was supposed to act as the entry-level model to the brand's cabriolet world. With the 718 Boxster, Porsche offers a convertible at a competitive price as well.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the Bentayga, Bentley introduced the first SUV in the brand's 100-year history. Range Rover took a different approach with the Evoque Cabriolet: they offered a convertible option for their SUV model. And: the Mercedes AMG GLE coupe.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The German company Performmaster upgraded the Mercedes C63 AMG S, chip tuning from the Racechip company gave the Porsche Macan Turbo even more bite and Kellener did their take on the BMW 640i.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: How do you top the already in many ways superior iconic Porsche 911? You come up with the GT3. It's the ultimate melange of road suitability and race track compatibility. And Porsche's RS model is even more intense.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Tushek TS600, a limited edition super sports car had a power/weight ratio that is on the level of GT3 racing cars. The Bentley Continental GT3-R special edition was also limited whereas McLaren offered their 570S to all customers.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Even in the world of super sports cars people get goose bumps if they hear the name Lamborghini. Wherever they're spotted, the Huracan and the Aventador always receive lots of attention.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: In 2014, Mercedes-Benz presented their first Plug-in Hybrid, the S500. When it comes to Bentley, a V8 engine means down-sizing. We took a look at the brand's Flying Spur model with a smaller engine. And: the 6th generation Maserati Quattroporte.

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Classic Ride

programme.title: Chevrolet Corvair

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: What is crucial in a sports car? Performance? Precision? Or the unrivalled feeling of dominating the road - such as in the McLaren 600 LT, the Aston Martin Vantage or the Alfa Romeo Giulia GTAm?

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, we'll dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur

programme.title: Indipedia
programme.desc: A light and peppy anchor driven half-hour episodic series that explores the reasons, bellefs and logic behind the customs and rituals observed as a norm In India, often so casually that most of us have never really asked why they arethe way they are.

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, we'll dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur

programme.title: The Mercedes EQS SUV Electric Art Line Driving Video
programme.desc: With the luxury saloon EQS and the sporty executive saloon EQE, Mercedes-Benz has entered a new, all-electric era in the upper market segments as well. The EQS SUV, the third model series with this architecture developed for electric vehicles, will soon follow. The SUV offers plenty of space, comfort and connectivity for up to seven passengers in its avant-garde, luxurious interior. Thanks to powerful electric motors, responsive 4MATIC all-wheel drive and an intelligent OFFROAD driving mode, the EQS SUV is also capable of tackling light terrain with ease. The new EQS SUV shares the long wheelbase (3210 millimetres) with the EQS Saloon, but is over 20 centimetres higher. The dimensions in detail: 5125/1959/1718 millimetres (length/width/height). The interior dimensions benefit from these generous SUV dimensions and from the advantages of the purpose design tailored to the electric platform. The second row of seats can be electrically adjusted as standard. Up to four golf bags fit in the boot. A third row of seats with two additional individual seats and extensive comfort features for all passengers is available as an option.

programme.title: The world premiere of the Volkswagen ID_Buzz Interview
programme.desc: Automotions

programme.title: Colour change with the power of thought
programme.sub-title: The BMW iX Flow meets neuro-technology
programme.desc: The Munich-based startup brainboost used the new and improved colour-changing effect in a one-off collaboration with the BMW Group at rad°hub aimed at raising awareness of mental health. With the help of brainboost, the BMW iX Flow was connected directly to the brain of the rad°hub delegates using an electroencephalograph (EEG), which records the brain's electrical activity. “The colour patterns of the BMW iX Flow react to brain activity and reflect the level of activity,” explains brainboost CEO Philipp Heiler. “Once the brain is at rest, the changes of patterns on the iX Flow also become calmer and more rhythmical.” A special animation was activated if delegates managed to maintain this state for several seconds. Thus, the participants were able to gradually calm and relax their brains under the guidance of the brainboost experts and with the help of neurofeedback via the iX Flow. This matures the knowledge of which strategies work best to specifically shut down one's own brain activity for relaxation, e.g. in everyday working life.

programme.title: Wellbeing behind the wheel – The new Bentley Azure Range
programme.desc: To celebrate the arrival of the new Bentayga EWB, an exclusive First Edition is now available. Subject to a limited production run for the first twelve months of orders, it combines many of the most desirable options available for the car with a package of eye-catching details found only on Bentley First Editions. First Edition badging can be seen to the exterior of the car – a theme that extends inside, with badging on the veneered fascia, as well as embroidery on the seats. Unique First Edition contrast stitching and embroidery adorns the seats and, depending on the choice of veneers, handcrafted metal overlays just 0.075 mm thick can be applied to the fascia and waistrails in the front and the rear door veneer. The First Edition offers elegant and timeless design, focusing on maximum comfort and well-being. This specifically tailored specification includes a unique 22” ten-spoke directional wheel and bright lower bumper grilles. Other additional features as standard include unique quilted seats, mood lighting, a heated steering wheel, and increased driver's assistance aids. Attention to detail is clear, from the badging that identifies the car to the jewelled caps on the fuel and oil fillers.

programme.title: The new Porsche 911 GT3 R
programme.desc: The turbocharged three-litre flat-six in the new 911 GTS delivers 353 kW (480 PS). Maximum torque is 570 Nm, an increase of 20 Nm over its predecessor. Zero to 100 km/h takes just 3.3 seconds (911 Carrera 4 GTS: Fuel consumption combined (NEDC) 10.5 – 9.7 l/100 km, Fuel consumption combined (WLTP) 11.4 – 10.6 l/100 km, CO₂ emissions combined (NEDC) 240 – 222 g/km, CO₂ emissions combined (WLTP) 259 – 240 g/km) in the 911 Carrera 4 GTS Coupé with the eight-speed Porsche dual-clutch transmission (PDK): three tenths faster than its predecessor. A seven-speed manual transmission with a particularly short throw is available for all 911 GTS models as an alternative to the PDK.

programme.title: From concept vehicle to full-production ID. Buzz
programme.sub-title: How was the electric Microbus created
programme.desc: The new model line's assistance systems perfect ease of driving and safety. Included as standard in the ID. Buzz and ID. Buzz Cargo is the ‘Car2X' local warning system, which utilises signals from other vehicles and the transport infrastructure to spot hazards in real time. Also included as standard: the ‘Front Assist' emergency braking function and, in the MPV, the ‘Lane Assist' lane-keeping assistant. With new software, new assistance functions are also making their way into the ID. family. Available as an option is ‘Travel Assist with swarm data', which facilitates partially automated driving across the entire speed range and, for the first time, assisted lane-changing on the motorway. Also new: the ‘Memory Function' for automated parking on a previously saved route.

programme.title: Motor Valley 2022 inauguration

programme.title: Digitalized lighting technologies in the Audi A8
programme.desc: Light technology is steadily creating a wider range of possibilities and perspectives, from added safety for the driver, to external communication and individualization. Systematic light digitization raises the customer experience to a whole new level.

programme.title: New 2023 Range Rover Sport Design Reveal Film
programme.desc: The New Range Rover Sport has made its global premiere with a dramatic world-first climb up a flooded dam spillway in Iceland. The epic ascent saw New Range Rover Sport resist the surging torrent of water flowing down the ramp of the Karahnjukar Dam – the biggest of its kind in the world – at a rate of 750 tonnes per minute. A loss of traction risked plunging down the perilous 90m drop at the base of the spillway to the valley floor below. The successful spillway ascent was screened for the first time at an exclusive launch event at Jaguar Land Rover's Advanced Product Creation Centre at Gaydon, UK. Official James Bond stunt driver Jessica Hawkins was behind the wheel as the New Range Rover Sport demonstrated its grip, traction, performance and composure, completing the latest in a series of challenges for Land Rover's luxury performance SUV. Previous feats include a record-setting hill-climb at Pikes Peak, a first recorded crossing of the ‘Empty Quarter' desert in the Arabian Peninsula and a first ascent of the 999 steps to Heaven's Gate in China, in 2018.

programme.title: Hispano Suiza showcases its history in the Peralada Castle Museum
programme.desc: The history of Hispano Suiza is showcased, for the very first time, in the Peralada Castle Museum (Girona, Spain) where visitors will be able to contemplate the past and present of the legendary car brand founded in 1904 by Damián Mateu and Mark Birkigt. The Hispano Suiza Room will close the usual tour of the Peralada Castle Museum. After years of researching to gather the largest number of pieces and objects related to its history, Hispano Suiza becomes part of this important collection. The Hispano Suiza exhibition encompasses a journey through various decades: from the beginning of the 20th century, when Hispano Suiza was founded, to the present day. After passing through a luxurious hall, the public will be able to visit a recreation of the offices of Damián Mateu and Mark Birkigt, where countless business and technical ideas, emerged and took shape, turning Hispano Suiza into a point of reference, for luxury, comfort and technical solutions. In this area, the original painting 'Dame with a mink' by Ramon Casas takes pride of place: it was used as an illustration on the company's original shares.

programme.title: Digital Matrix LED and digital OLED technology in the new Audi A8 L Animation
programme.desc: Digital Matrix LED and digital OLED technology in the new Audi A8 L Animation

programme.title: TechDay Digital Light
programme.desc: Safety and customer satisfaction come first at Audi. They are part and parcel of the success of the company with the four rings. In that context, light technology is steadily growing more important and creating a wider range of possibilities and perspectives, from added safety for the driver, to external communication and individualization. Systematic light digitization is making all of this possible. It is particularly visible in the new Audi A8: the forward-looking Digital Matrix LED headlights and digital OLED rear lights raise the customer experience to a whole new level: for the first time in any Audi model, light is completely digitized. The car can be individualized even further through its digital OLED rear lights. The Digital Matrix LED headlights also include three new functions: advanced traffic information, a lane light with direction indicator lights on highways, and an orientation light on country roads. These features not only demonstrate Audi's “Vorsprung durch Technik,” they also add value.

programme.title: 2022 Peugeot 308
programme.desc: The sixth generation Opel/Vauxhall Astra and third generation Peugeot 308 are both based on the Stellantis EMP2 platform and, unsurprisingly, score very similarly across all four areas of assessment. Both the offset test and the full-width crash test highlighted marginal chest injury protection for average male and small female drivers, and neither car was equipped with a centre airbag for far-side crash protection, a countermeasure which is increasingly common on modern cars. Both cars offer plenty of crash avoidance technology but do not include some of the latest advancements introduced in the market. The cars' four-star ratings apply also to their PHEV variants.

programme.title: Stellantis Spotlight April 1, 2022
programme.desc: "Stellantis Spotlight" is a weekly recap of some of the major stories at Stellantis. The top stories for the week ending April 29, 2022, include Dodge brand announces the winner of its chief donut maker contest, Jeep® Grand Cherokee 4xe dominates annual Northwest Automotive Press Association (NWAPA) Mudfest and Stellantis awards more than $20,000 to college students in weekend Hackathon.

programme.title: 2022 Volvo C40 Recharge
programme.desc: The fully electric Volvo C40 Recharge has been awarded a five-star safety rating in the 2022 Euro NCAP tests, joining its siblings in the Volvo Cars line-up as one of the safest cars on the road today. The rating continues Volvo Cars' five-star streak in Euro NCAP testing, as all tested Volvo models on sale today received five stars in their respective Euro NCAP assessments. The C40 Recharge scored especially well on occupant safety and driver assist systems, helped by one of the most extensive standard safety offers in its segment. Among many other scenarios, these safety technologies help drivers detect and avoid collisions, remain in their lane and reduce the impact of accidentally running off the road.

programme.desc: Diana, Princess of Wales, was incredibly enchanting and unforgettable, leaving a lasting impact like no other woman of her era. Known as a fairy-tale princess, a loving wife, a dedicated mother, and a style icon, this documentary digs deeper to uncover the true person behind the endless spotlight.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature
programme.desc: Bolivia is a country of countless fascinating natural sights. We will begin on the high plateau of Altiplano, stopping by the world's largest salt lake.Later, we will descend a few thousand meters using the road of death to the Los Yungas province. And then on to the shores of lake Titicaca, the highest navigable lake in the world.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature
programme.desc: Zambia, the Latvian region of Kurzeme, the Georgian provinces of Kakheti and Svaneti, seem to have very little in common. They lie in Africa, Europe and on the borderline between Europe and Asia respectively. Kakheti and Svaneti are both a part of Georgia but very unlike one another. So where is the connection? How are these regions similar?

programme.title: My Yellow Table S3- Break Free
Cook the Books
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: Anna Olson's Baking Wisdom! Follow along as Shahir makes a breakfast galette, a classic apple tart, a rich brown butter pecan pie, and much more!

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud prepares recipes from his own award-winning cookbook, Eat, Habibi, Eat! Follow along as Shahir prepares a beautiful beet dip, Egyptian-inspired lamb chops, grilled whole fish, and much more!

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: Join engaging host, Bianca Osbourne, for a taste of two countries. First stop? Italy! Check out her recipe for succulent wild boar ribs, braised until tender, rolled in gremolata, and served over silky polenta. Next up? A culinary tribute to China, pairing lobster claw with chili oil, pomelo foam, and oyster sauce glazed bok choy. Every episode features a 'common ingredient', this time? It's noodles! Drool over two recipes: Italian classic Olio e Aglio next to chewy Chinese long Noodles tossed with Sichuan Chili Oil. For the big finale, Bianca blends Italian style with Chinese flavour for a one-of-a-kind CombiNation Plate: Kung Pao Pork Osso Bucco over Forbidden Black Rice Risotto... made with shiitake mushrooms and bright green edamame peas.

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: Turkey, think Silk Road spices. Indonesia, lots of seafood and tropical fruits! Curious and adventurous host Bianca Osbourne is your CombiNATION Plates culinary guide through both food cultures. First, check out Turkish Spice Crusted Lamb Rack with yogurt and blistered peppers. Next, an Indonesian tribute: Crab Leg with Coconut Curry. For the 'common ingredient'? Two takes on tender, savoury eggplant! Turkish Eggplant is braised and served with parsley and feta and the Indonesian take is served with fried garlic and sweet soy. For the CombiNATION Plate? Peanut- chili Sate sauce replaces walnut for Pazili TrancÌ§a, a classically Turkish halibut presentation, also served here with unique, savoury, coconut 'baklava' for a plate no-one has ever seen before!

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: From Canada to Greece, CombiNATION Plates always covers lots of ground! Kicking off, host Bianca Osbourne wows with ubERS-Canadian Roasted Venison Loin, yummy Fiddlehead Pancakes and sweet-tart Cranberry sauce. Next, enjoy a scenic Mediterranean vacation on a plate with her completely new approach to Greek Salad, taken up a notch or two with tasty seared Albacore Tuna! This episode's 'common ingredient' is lamb shank check out two wildly creative re- inventions first, of Canadian TourtieÌ€re, and then, Greek Dolmades. For a final recipe, a dessert fit for a lumberjack or a Greek god! Oka Saganaki with McIntosh Apple Butter and Maple Loukoumades made with nutty Canadian Oka cheese, fried crisp, flambeÌed with Ouzo, then dusted with dried raspberry powder and maple sugar flakes. 'Opa!' meets Oka!

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: In this episode of CombiNATION Plates, host Bianca Osbourne starts in Mexico with her version of popular street snack, 'Esquites', re-invented here as sweet corn flan. Next is Norway, don't miss explosively exciting quick-smoked Arctic Char with Forage, you've NEVER seen anything like this before. The common ingredient is tacos! From Norway, 'Lefse' is a potato-flour 'tortilla' served with fresh berries and uniquely Scandinavian 'Brunost' cheese. Representing Mexico, check out spicy pork and pineapple 'Tacos al Pastor'. The Big Dish is Lamb Pinnekjott with Birch Bark Tamale, lamb ribs are seasoned, birch bark is stuffed with masa and veggies, both are steamed over birch branches and boozy Akvavit, then plated with dill and bright red chili oil.

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: Join Bianca Osbourne to taste and combine! Fun CombiNATION Plates host Bianca Osbourne starts this episode with an inspired tribute to Georgian cuisine Beef Tartare with Tkemali (sour plum sauce), marigold powder, and tart, crunchy pickles. Next feast your eyes on her unique Hong Kong dumpling: plump scallops, pork, and veggies are blended, rolled, steamed, sliced, and then served with Crispy Yu Choy and XO. The common ingredient is rabbit! Georgia offers up Rabbit 'Mtsvadi', grilled and glazed with pomegranate reduction. Hong Kong represents with Sweet and Sour Rabbit, Grilled Pineapple and Red Pepper Coulis. Finally, Georgian Milk Braised meets Chinese/Hong Kong-style Roast Duck with quail egg and cheese stuffed 'Khachapuri Dumpling' and crunchy 'Peking Duck Crumble', and it's a plate no-one has ever seen before!

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: CombiNATION Plates host Bianca Osbourne is always looking for the best food in the world to share. The first stop is South Korea with her Sesame Crusted Tuna 'Yukhoe', a delicious blend of favourite Korean flavours. Next stamp on the passport? Spain! Mouth-watering Duck Breast is seared and served rare with a crispy artichoke heart, membrillo, olives, and sweet-savoury sherry reduction. Beef short ribs are the common ingredient with Catalonian Braised and Romesco to one side and sticky Korean Kalbi-style grilled to the east! For the topper, drool over Bulgogi Octopus simmered and served with saffron-scented Sticky Rice Paella cakes, finished with crispy Paprika-Gochujang battered mussel. Yep, it tastes as good as it sounds!

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.desc: Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks her way from Monday to Friday with four delicious dishes, including a Roast Beef feast and velvety Earl Grey Pudding.

programme.title: Pressure's On

programme.title: Pressure's On

programme.title: Amplify: USVI
programme.desc: Host Naydyeyah Acoy-Thomas traces the rich, layered history of St. Croix's musical roots, uncovering the deep ties to African, European, and indigenous Taíno traditions. Featuring voices like Asta Williams, Willard John, Rashidi Clenance, and Vio International, the episode explores how genres such as quelbe, calypso, and scratch band music were born from the island's complex past. Through storytelling, performances, and cultural insight, Naydyeyah reveals how the rhythms of resilience and celebration continue to echo through generations.

programme.title: Amplify: USVI
programme.desc: Host Naydyeyah Acoy-Thomas uncovers the revolutionary spirit woven into the music of St. Croix, where sound has long served as a rallying cry for justice and identity. Through the powerful perspectives of Mada Nile, Ras Attitude, Ras Bach, the Ay-Ay Cultural Dancers, and Kevin Williams, this episode explores how artists have used music to confront oppression, celebrate resilience, and inspire change — from the island's historic struggles to its modern-day movements.
